overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage in a foggy mountain village, beginning at a working stone smelter with NPC workers, proceeding through a settlement with traditional thatched-roof wooden houses, and concluding on a covered porch with a dining table.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor smelting area with stone furnace and coal piles

events.description: camera moves close to smelter to view the glowing furnace interior
camera pulls back from smelter to reveal NPC workers shoveling coal

agents.ego_description: circling the stone smelter and examining the furnace while observing the workers

notable_agents.action: shoveling coal into a pile with a pickaxe near the smelter
standing with arms crossed observing the smelter operations

entered.detail: domed stone furnace with glowing orange interior and metal fixtures
steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation
large dark mound of coal or ore next to the smelter
stacked wooden containers near the smelter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy outdoor smelting area dominated by a stone furnace. The camera circles the smelter, revealing its glowing interior, then pulls back to show two NPC workers—one actively shoveling coal while the other observes with arms crossed. The environment features dirt ground, wooden crates, and steep mountain cliffs in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path between thatched-roof wooden houses

events.description: leaving the smelter area and entering the village path between houses

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path through the foggy village, passing traditional wooden houses

entered.detail: large wooden building with steep thatched roof and stone foundation
smaller thatched-roof structure visible down the path
unpaved trail winding through the village

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the industrial smelter area to a quiet village path. Walking forward along the dirt trail, the scene passes traditional wooden houses with thatched roofs and stone foundations set against a backdrop of fog-shrouded mountains and scattered pine trees. No other characters are present in this section.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden porch with outdoor dining area

events.description: entering the covered porch area of the wooden house
approaching the wooden table set with food and bottles

agents.ego_description: walking onto the covered porch and approaching a table set with bread and drink bottles

notable_agents.action: leaning against the wooden wall near the doorway with arms crossed

entered.detail: thick wooden posts supporting the porch roof
long wooden dining table with benches
several round loaves of bread placed on the table
amber glass bottles arranged on the table surface
simple wooden fence along the porch edge overlooking the mountains

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a sheltered porch area, transitioning from the open village to a semi-enclosed wooden deck. An NPC leans against the wall near the entrance as the camera approaches a rustic table laid with bread loaves and glass bottles. Thick support pillars and a wooden railing frame views of the foggy mountains beyond, while the interior remains dimly lit compared to the overcast exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a glowing industrial smelting site through a quiet mountain village and into a sheltered domestic space. It begins by circling a stone furnace with a glowing interior, pulling back to reveal workers shoveling coal amidst wooden crates and steep cliffs. As the camera leaves the smelter, the scene shifts to a dirt path where the industrial noise fades into a quiet walk past traditional thatched-roof wooden houses and fog-shrouded pine trees. The movement then transitions from the open village trail into a semi-enclosed wooden porch, passing a leaning NPC to approach a rustic table set with bread and bottles. Finally, the view is framed by thick support pillars and railings that look back out toward the overcast mountains from the dimly lit shelter.
